reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención.Muy buen servicio.El restaurante es destacable,el trato cordial y amable de los que lo trabajan , cenamos una parrillada muy bien asada y abundante. Todo riquísimo .Parrilla libre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very good. The restaurant is outstanding, with the friendly and courteous staff. We had a well-grilled and plentiful barbecue dinner. Everything was delicious. All-you-can-eat grill.
